title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: Antonelli reveals Mercedes' intra-team rules in Austria
items.content: Kimi Antonelli admits that claiming this year's Formula 1 title is "not going to be a walk in the park" and has explained Mercedes' new intra-team orders ahead of this weekend's Austrian Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: Kimi Antonelli admits that claiming this year's Formula 1 title is "not going to be a walk in the park" and has explained Mercedes' new intra-team orders ahead of this weekend's Austrian Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Ferrari ‘pushing like crazy’ on updated power unit – Leclerc
items.content: Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc is hopeful that the upgrade will contribute to a clean weekend at the Austrian Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc is hopeful that the upgrade will contribute to a clean weekend at the Austrian Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Verstappen on hopes for Red Bull's Austria upgrades
items.content: Red Bull are set to run an upgrade package at their home event in Austria, with Max Verstappen hopeful that this will bring "more performance to the car".
items.contentSnippet: Red Bull are set to run an upgrade package at their home event in Austria, with Max Verstappen hopeful that this will bring "more performance to the car".
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Hamilton a ‘big threat’ to championship bid – Russell
items.content: After Lewis Hamilton's return to victory last time out in Barcelona, George Russell thinks that his former team mate is a clear threat in the title fight.
items.contentSnippet: After Lewis Hamilton's return to victory last time out in Barcelona, George Russell thinks that his former team mate is a clear threat in the title fight.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Hamilton rates chances of title push after first Ferrari win
items.content: Lewis Hamilton believes “the opportunity is there” to challenge for title glory in 2026, even if Ferrari have “a real battle on our hands” to build on their recent strong form and overhaul early pace-setters Mercedes.
items.contentSnippet: Lewis Hamilton believes “the opportunity is there” to challenge for title glory in 2026, even if Ferrari have “a real battle on our hands” to build on their recent strong form and overhaul early pace-setters Mercedes.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Alonso addresses speculation linking him to other teams
items.content: Amid speculation over his future, Fernando Alonso has shared his thoughts on the factors that will influence his decision.
items.contentSnippet: Amid speculation over his future, Fernando Alonso has shared his thoughts on the factors that will influence his decision.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Piastri reveals plan for McLaren’s ‘experimental’ rear wing
items.content: McLaren are set to run an “experimental” rear wing during Friday practice at the Austrian Grand Prix, with Oscar Piastri confirming that it will only be tested – and not raced – at this stage.
items.contentSnippet: McLaren are set to run an “experimental” rear wing during Friday practice at the Austrian Grand Prix, with Oscar Piastri confirming that it will only be tested – and not raced – at this stage.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Why Aston Martin are committed to a bold upgrade schedule
items.content: Recent weeks have seen a Formula 1 development war well underway with most teams bringing new parts almost every race, and rivals carefully checking the FIA’s official list of aerodynamic upgrades. However Aston Martin have taken a step back from the usual schedule to follow their own path – and despite the pain that entails, have stuck to it.
items.contentSnippet: Recent weeks have seen a Formula 1 development war well underway with most teams bringing new parts almost every race, and rivals carefully checking the FIA’s official list of aerodynamic upgrades. However Aston Martin have taken a step back from the usual schedule to follow their own path – and despite the pain that entails, have stuck to it.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: What does the Austrian GP ‘heat hazard’ declaration mean?
items.content: Another ‘heat hazard’ has been declared by Formula 1’s governing body, the FIA, ahead of the Austrian Grand Prix weekend. But what exactly does it mean for the teams and the drivers at Spielberg’s Red Bull Ring? F1.com offers an all-in-one reminder…

items.title: Which rookies are getting FP1 outings in Austria?
items.content: A few different names will appear on the timesheets during first practice at the Austrian Grand Prix.
